forBusiness.heroSubtitle: Reach thousands of students in your area. Manage classes, track bookings, and grow your business — all in one place.
forBusiness.featuresSubtitle: Powerful tools designed to help you manage and grow your activity business.
forBusiness.featureManageDescription: Create and organize your classes with an intuitive dashboard. Set schedules, pricing, and capacity in minutes.
forBusiness.featureBookingsDescription: Real-time booking management with automatic confirmations, reminders, and waitlist handling.
forBusiness.featureMarketingDescription: Built-in promotions, featured listings, and social sharing to attract new students.
forBusiness.featureAnalyticsDescription: Track revenue, attendance, and growth with detailed reports and actionable insights.
forBusiness.howItWorksSubtitle: Get started in three simple steps
forBusiness.step1Description: Sign up for free and set up your business profile with photos, description, and contact details.
forBusiness.step2Description: List your activities with schedules, pricing, and locations. Our tools make it quick and easy.
forBusiness.step3Description: Students discover and book your classes. Track everything from your dashboard and watch your business grow.
forBusiness.testimonialsSubtitle: Join hundreds of businesses already growing with ClassCat
forBusiness.testimonial1Quote: ClassCat transformed how we manage our yoga studio. Bookings are up 40% since we joined.
forBusiness.testimonial2Quote: The analytics dashboard alone is worth it. We finally understand which classes perform best.
forBusiness.testimonial3Quote: We went from 20 to 150 students in six months. The marketing tools really work.
forBusiness.testimonial4Quote: Simple, beautiful, and our students love the booking experience. Best decision we made.
forBusiness.ctaDescription: Join hundreds of businesses using ClassCat to reach more students and manage their classes effortlessly.

about.heroSubtitle: ClassCat is an activity discovery platform that helps people find classes, workshops, and courses in their neighborhood.
about.missionDescription: We believe learning should be accessible, social, and local. ClassCat connects curious minds with passionate instructors and local businesses offering classes across fitness, arts, music, cooking, and more.
about.communityDescription: We champion local businesses and instructors, helping them reach students who are eager to learn something new.
about.accessDescription: Everyone deserves the chance to discover a new skill. We make it easy to find and book classes that fit your schedule and budget.
about.qualityDescription: Every instructor on ClassCat is verified. Real reviews from real students help you choose with confidence.

howItWorks.heroTitle: Find your next class in three easy steps
howItWorks.heroSubtitle: ClassCat makes it simple to discover, compare, and book local classes and activities.
howItWorks.step1Description: Explore hundreds of local classes across categories like fitness, art, music, cooking, and more. Use filters to find the perfect match for your schedule, budget, and interests.
howItWorks.step2Description: Found something you like? Send an inquiry to the instructor with your preferred date and time. They'll get back to you with availability and pricing details.
howItWorks.step3Description: Show up, have fun, and learn something new. After your class, leave a review to help others find great experiences too.

contact.heroSubtitle: Have a question, suggestion, or just want to say hello? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.emailDescription: For general inquiries, partnerships, or feedback. We typically respond within 24–48 hours.
contact.businessDescription: Interested in listing your classes on ClassCat? Reach out and we'll help you get started.
contact.socialDescription: Stay up to date with new features, tips, and community stories.

help.heroSubtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about ClassCat.
help.a1: ClassCat is an activity discovery platform that helps you find local classes, workshops, and courses. Browse by category, location, or age group to find the perfect activity.
help.a2: Yes! Browsing and searching for activities on ClassCat is completely free. You only pay when you book a class directly with an instructor or business.
help.q3: How do I create an account?
help.a3: Click 'Sign In' in the top navigation, then choose 'Sign up' to create a new account with your email address.
help.q4: How do I book a class?
help.a4: Find an activity you like, choose your preferred date and time, and send an inquiry. The instructor will confirm your booking and provide payment details.
help.a5: Cancellation policies vary by instructor and business. Check the specific activity listing for cancellation terms, or contact the instructor directly.
help.q6: What if a class is full?
help.a6: If a class shows as full, you can still send an inquiry — the instructor may have upcoming sessions or be able to accommodate you.
help.q7: How do I list my business on ClassCat?
help.a7: Visit the 'For Business' page and click 'Get Started Free.' You'll go through a simple onboarding process to set up your profile, add classes, and start reaching students.
help.q8: Is there a fee for businesses?
help.a8: Creating a business profile is free. We may introduce premium features in the future, but basic listing and booking tools will always be free.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.templateNotice: This is a template privacy policy. Replace with your actual privacy policy before launching.
privacy.introText: ClassCat ("we", "our", "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our platform.
privacy.collectText: We may collect personal information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, and location when you create an account. We also collect usage data such as pages visited and features used to improve our service.
privacy.useText: We use your information to provide and improve our services, communicate with you about bookings and updates, personalize your experience, and ensure the security of our platform.
privacy.sharingText: We do not sell your personal information. We may share limited data with instructors and businesses you interact with (e.g., when you send a booking inquiry), and with service providers that help us operate the platform.
privacy.cookiesText: We use cookies and similar technologies to maintain your session, remember your preferences, and analyze platform usage. You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.
privacy.rightsText: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You may also request a copy of your data or object to certain processing activities. Contact us at hello@classcat.pl for any privacy-related requests.
privacy.contactText: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at hello@classcat.pl.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.templateNotice: This is a template terms of service. Replace with your actual terms before launching.
terms.acceptanceText: By using ClassCat, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform.
terms.serviceText: ClassCat is an activity discovery platform that connects students with local classes and instructors. We facilitate discovery and communication but do not directly provide classes or guarantee outcomes.
terms.accountsText: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and for all activity under it. You must provide accurate information when creating an account and keep it up to date.
terms.bookingsText: ClassCat facilitates communication between students and instructors. Booking terms, cancellation policies, and payments are agreed upon between you and the instructor or business. ClassCat is not a party to these transactions.
terms.conductText: You agree to use ClassCat respectfully and lawfully. You may not post false or misleading information, harass other users, or use the platform for unauthorized commercial purposes.
terms.ipText: All content, design, and branding on ClassCat is owned by ClassCat or its licensors. You may not copy, modify, or distribute our content without permission.
terms.liabilityText: ClassCat is provided "as is" without warranties. We are not liable for any damages arising from your use of the platform, interactions with instructors, or reliance on information provided.
terms.changesText: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of ClassCat after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
terms.contactText: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at hello@classcat.pl.
